title: Signit- A mod to sign anything!
description: A Fabric mod that lets you “sign” items with an emerald, stamping them with rarity, timestamp, and signer info and handing you back a collectible item with human‑readable metadata.
body:
SignIt lets players autograph their gear with zero fuss.

Use: hold the item you want to sign in your main hand and an emerald in your off-hand, then right-click.

The mod writes your username and a clear date-time stamp into the item’s lore, so anyone can see who signed it and when.

Server-side only—drop the jar into /mods, restart, and it just works on Fabric and (coming in future release ) NeoForge 1.21.1.

All rights reserved. Redistribution or modpack use requires my permission.
